concept: Hospitality / The Path to an Encompassing Self
description: The generous and warm reception of guests or strangers. It is the practice of extending one's own space and resources to create a feeling of welcome and safety for another.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'who' (an encompassing space), 'la' (path), and 'mi' (the inner self). The word's structure suggests 'a path for another into one's encompassing self.' This frames hospitality as a profound act of opening one's personal space and self to include another.
